title: Flaky Veggie Sour Toast
description: A simple, crunchy toast dish topped with a flavorful mix of sautéed veggies and a tangy sour sauce.
instructions: Preheat your wok or frying pan to medium-high heat.
Cut your veggie mix into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Add the veggie oil to the pan and sauté the veggie mix until crispy.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sour sauce ingredients (see notes).
Pour the sour sauce over the veggie mix and stir to combine.
Serve the veggie mix over the flaky toast and enjoy!
Notes: To make the sour sauce, mix 1 tablespoon of soy sauce with 1 tablespoon of rice vinegar and 1 tablespoon of water.
